TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-seediq_dakis 2020s

S.FORM: m m a tikuh kari maanu di kesaun a pusu ta bale a rudan nita seediq.
S.TRANSL: 我要述說一個故事，所謂我們賽德克族的始祖起源之說。
I am going to tell a story, the so-called origin of our Seediq ancestors.

S.FORM: e kari nii uri uri ge e tngesaan ku na ima di sk a sktiwas pawan uri daka skpawan nawi peni.
S.TRANSL: 這故事是已過世的Tiwas Pawan和 Pawan Nawi教我的。
The story was taught to me by the late Tiwas Pawan and Pawan Nawi.

S.FORM: ani si huwa ka bobo de egu ka rdrudan nodaan mu smiling uri ha m mesa ka kari na.
S.TRANSL: 但是之後，我也請教過許許多多的族老，他是這麼說的。
But afterwards, I have also consulted many elders, and the following is what he said.

S.FORM: en eniqan kingan a e dgiyaq e dgiyaq e dgiyaq paru ha bnuhun kesaun na.
S.TRANSL: 有座大山脈。
There is a huge mountain.

S.FORM: bnuhun mesa kari ta ita.
S.TRANSL: 我們稱（它）為Bnuhun。
We call (it) Bnuhun.

S.FORM: bnuhun nii na saya di na kiya ka han han a han maduk seediq peni.
S.TRANSL: 這個Bnuhun現在已經成為賽德克人去打獵的地方。
This Bnuhun now has been the area to go hunting for the Seediq.

S.FORM: a maduk mesa ka toda ha.
S.TRANSL: Toda人稱為maduk。
Todas call (it) “maduk” .

S.FORM: adukun asi ta kesai ita ita tgdaya peni.
S.TRANSL: 我們Tgdaya人稱之為Dupun (狩獵的地方)。
We, the Tgdaya call it Dupun.

S.FORM: ani dehuk saya na lmiqu nii na egu riyung ani maanu ka truma hiya camac peni.
S.TRANSL: 即使至今，山區域內仍有很多動物。
Even until now, in the mountain area there are still many animals.

S.FORM: ma cbeyo si cbeyo cbeyo wada so kenu a kenu cbeyo na ini kelai ini kelai smepu si na.
S.TRANSL: 然後以前，很久很久以前，好像不知道該如何計算了。
Then in the past, long long time ago, like we don’t know how to count.

S.FORM: e kika dgiyaq kesaun bnuhun nii na eniqan kingan qhuni paru.
S.TRANSL: 在所謂的Bnuhun有一棵大樹。
In the so-called Bnuhun, there existed a big tree.

S.FORM: n so ru kari na rudan paru riyung sa qhuni nii ma kika qhuni nii ne qhu qhuni nii ge ga so hari ga tloong maanu di e dgiyaq peni.
S.TRANSL: 族老說這棵樹非常大，所以像是座落在山巒之間。
The elders said that this tree is very big, so it’s like it sits within the mountains.

S.FORM: ma kika qhuni nii na en pusu na peni na eniqan lhengo paru.
S.TRANSL: 然後這棵樹的底部，有一個大洞穴。
Then at the lower trunk of this big, there exists a big cave

S.FORM: ma qsiya kii na msbobo ka s nrcilungan na hii di na gcilung kii di na kika thuwe muda maanu di berah na ka qsiya nii musa mttuting quri icin.
S.TRANSL: 然後水... 積水溢出水池，慢慢流經它前面，到另外一邊。
Then the water... the accumulated water overflowed the pool, and slowly flowed pass its (the tree) front to the other side.

S.FORM: ma pusu kika beling nii peni na kiya ka nsperuqan kesaun pusu ta ba ita.
S.TRANSL: 所以樹底這個洞穴，就是傳說中我們真正始祖起源之地。
So the cave at the lower trunk was reportedly the real birthplace of our ancestors.

S.FORM: rudan ru a pusu ta ba rudan ita seediq mesa ka rudan ba rudan ta cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: （那就是）我們賽德克始祖的真正起源，老人家說，我們過去真正的祖先。
(That is) the real origin of our ancestors, our Seediq ancestors, the elderly said, our real ancestors in the past.

S.FORM: kari nii ge uxe kari hndure nii uri ha kari ba kndalax cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事也不是最近才傳開的，而是來自過去。
This story was not recently told, but came from the past.

S.FORM: ma qitaun qitaun kesaun pusu qhuni nii na.
S.TRANSL: 然後看看這個傳說中的樹幹底部。
Then looking at this legendary lower trunk of the tree.

S.FORM: ye adoka gaga dgiyaq peni na qhuni ka baga na sa a kana ba baga na a daha baga na ma teerang we mgrabang mgrabang bhege ka teerang na.
S.TRANSL: 或許因為樹幹底部坐落在山巒間，它的手是樹... 它的全部手... 它的兩隻手... ，然後灰白的胸膛，它的胸膛是灰白色。
Maybe because it exists in the mountains, its hands are trees... all its hands... both of its hands... and then the ashen chest, its chest is of the color ashen and white.

S.FORM: ma paru riyung qitaan a ma kika a ye ma mesa ka kari rudan.
S.TRANSL: 然後，所以族老說看起來很大。
Then, so the elderly said (it) looked very huge.

S.FORM: u sknuwan ka maanu di yani wada sbgihun paru peni na.
S.TRANSL: 不知道什麼時候，有一天起了大風。
No one knows when, one day there was a big wind.

S.FORM: wada na maanu di gerungan a bgihun ka baga na a baga na narac.
S.TRANSL: 風折斷它的手... 它的右手。
The wind snapped its hand... its right hand.

S.FORM: kiya si a maanu di ciida si na da e kari daha na.
S.TRANSL: 那就是他們當時的故事。
That is their story then.

S.FORM: kingan mqedin ma kingan rseno pnsperuq hiya mesa.
S.TRANSL: 據說一男一女在那裏誕生。
A woman and a man were said to be born there

S.FORM: ma kingan kari daha we kingan mqedin ma daha rseno mesa.
S.TRANSL: 另一種故事說一女兩男。
The other story says one woman and two men.

S.FORM: ma kika kingan mqedin kingan rseno nii e kika wada m prana ita di mesa ka rudan ha.
S.TRANSL: 族老說那一女一男，就是繁衍我族的祖先。
The elders said that these one man and woman reproduced us.

S.FORM: netun so daha rseno kingan mqedin na daha ru daha bale a da teru mu teru seediq nii na msperuq ciida.
S.TRANSL: 兩男一女，這三個人呢那時候誕生。
Two men and one woman, these three people were born then.

S.FORM: ma kingan mqedin ma daha rseno.
S.TRANSL: 是一女兩男。
(They are) one woman and two men.

S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan rseno ge ma mesa qmita kesaun ga ta eniqan bobo dheran nii peni.
S.TRANSL: 然後一個男人看著我們現在居住的世界。
Then one man looked at the world where we now live.

S.FORM: ma uxe nii di uka ani maanu mesa si.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼什麼都沒有？」，他說。
“Why isn’t there anything?” (he) said.

S.FORM: maha ka ku da uxe ku menaq hini yamu naq enaq hini di mesa.
S.TRANSL: 「我要走了，我不待在這裡，你們自己居住在這裡吧。」他說。
“I am leaving. I’m not staying here. You stay here on your own.” (he) said.

S.FORM: kika irih so daha kingan mqedin kingan a rseno ka dheya kiya uri.
S.TRANSL: 所以，可以說（一女兩男的傳說）相似於一女一男的傳說。
Therefore, (the story of one woman and two men) is similar to the story of one woman and one man.

S.FORM: ma kingan rseno daka kingan mqedin nii ka kiya ka pusu ta bale ita.
S.TRANSL: 這一男一女真的就是我們的根源。
This one man and woman are our real origin.

S.FORM: rudan ta ita kesaun seediq mesa.
S.TRANSL: 他們據說就是我們賽德克人的祖先。
They are said to be the ancestors of us, the Seediq.

S.FORM: kari daha e rudan ta dehuk saya.
S.TRANSL: 即使到了今天，我們族老們都還這麼說。
Our elders said so even until now.
